items.title: LEAD: Length-Efficient Adaptive and Dynamic Reasoning for Large Language Models
items.abstract: Large reasoning models, such as OpenAI o1 and DeepSeek-R1, tend to become increasingly verbose as their reasoning capabilities improve. These inflated Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories often exceed

items.title: From Pixels to Concepts: Do Segmentation Models Understand What They Segment?

items.title: Offline Preference Optimization for Rectified Flow with Noise-Tracked Pairs
